name: llama-skein
tagline: Hot-swap local models behind one OpenAI-compatible API, with hardware-aware budgeting.
description: An inference proxy that sits in front of llama.cpp (and other OpenAI-compatible engines) and exposes a single unified API with on-demand model hot-swapping, hardware/VRAM reporting, and LAN discovery. A single static Go binary, built for the skein ecosystem.

features.title: On-demand model hot-swapping
features.summary: Detects the requested model per call and loads/unloads/swaps the running model automatically — no manual restart to change models.

features.title: Unified OpenAI-compatible API
features.summary: Pass-through for /v1/chat/completions, /v1/completions, /v1/embeddings, /v1/models and audio/image endpoints, so existing OpenAI clients work unchanged.

features.title: Hardware & resource reporting
features.summary: Reports GPU/VRAM usage, unified/system memory, loaded-model size and KV-cache estimates via /api/hardware — the data behind opencode-skein's live memory bars.

features.title: CPU/MoE offload recommendations
features.summary: Analyzes available VRAM and recommends offloading compute or mixture-of-experts layers to CPU for large MoE models (/api/models/offload).

features.title: Config-driven model lifecycle
features.summary: YAML config with TTL auto-unload, model aliases, per-model env vars, and grouping/swap matrices for concurrent multi-model execution.

features.title: mDNS LAN advertising
features.summary: Advertises the instance over mDNS/zeroconf so opencode-skein and the skein supervisor discover and connect to it without hardcoded IPs.

features.title: Control-plane model & capability API
features.summary: Skein-specific endpoints to query/patch model state, set a default model, set per-model context size (triggers a reload), and detect hardware backends (Metal/ROCm/CUDA/Vulkan).

features.title: Any OpenAI-compatible engine
features.summary: Front llama.cpp, vLLM, tabbyAPI, stable-diffusion.cpp or Whisper; supports container backends with graceful SIGTERM shutdown.
